languages.text: {n}Осознав, что сейчас произойдет, наследница перестает сопротивляться и закрывает глаза. Последние мгновения она посвящает молитве.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n]Осознав, что сейчас произойдет, наследница перестает сопротивляться и закрывает глаза. Последние мгновения она посвящает молитве.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Осознав, что сейчас произойдет, наследница перестает сопротивляться и закрывает глаза. Последние мгновения она посвящает молитве.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

{n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}尤文娜意识到即将发生什么，她停止了抵抗，合上了双眼。在生命的最后时刻，她一直在念诵祷词。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜意识到即将发生什么，她停止了抵抗，合上了双眼。在生命的最后时刻，她一直在念诵祷词。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Réalisant ce qui va lui arriver, Juvenna cesse de résister et ferme les yeux pour passer ses derniers instants à prier.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Réalisant ce qui va lui arriver, Juvenna cesse de résister et ferme les yeux pour passer ses derniers instants à prier.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ne olacağını anlayan Juvenna, direnmeyi bırakıp gözlerini kapatıyor. Son saniyelerini dua ederek geçiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ne olacağını anlayan Juvenna, direnmeyi bırakıp gözlerini kapatıyor. Son saniyelerini dua ederek geçiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando comprende lo que va a ocurrir, Juvenna deja de resistirse y cierra los ojos. Dedica sus últimos instantes a rezar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando comprende lo que va a ocurrir, Juvenna deja de resistirse y cierra los ojos. Dedica sus últimos instantes a rezar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als sie erkennt, was gleich passieren wird, gibt Juvenna ihren Widerstand auf und schließt die Augen. Sie nutzt ihre letzten Sekunden für ein Gebet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als sie erkennt, was gleich passieren wird, gibt Juvenna ihren Widerstand auf und schließt die Augen. Sie nutzt ihre letzten Sekunden für ein Gebet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ユベナは自分の運命を悟り、抵抗を止めて目を閉じた。最後の瞬間は祈りに捧げられた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ユベナは自分の運命を悟り、抵抗を止めて目を閉じた。最後の瞬間は祈りに捧げられた。{/n}
